journal_observations: features.json без канонической схемы: checklist Phase 5.2 называет поля description/steps/passes, контракт оператора дал title/acceptance/verify — имена полей пришлось выбирать самому (взял операторские + id/preconditions); kit'у нужен один canonical schema-пример features.json

No-empty-tests guard описан только для vitest (--passWithNoTests); для pytest эквивалента-флага нет (пустой набор = exit 5), рецепт выведен самостоятельно — smoke-тест tests/test_smoke.py + комментарий в init.sh; kit'у не хватает per-runner рецепта guard'а

Конфликт контракта и checklist'а не разрешён playbook'ом: оператор сказал «deny не нужен», но checklist «Rewrite-with-donors» требует механический read-only-pin донора (продукт — rewrite dev/-скриптов соседа, F1-smoke читает его CSV) — следовал checklist'у (deny Edit/Write); заодно путь донора из контракта (AI_analyst_migration/) не существовал verbatim — реальный AI_analyst_for_work/AI_analyst_migration/ найден detect-then-prescribe; playbook не говорит, что делать при расхождении контракта с диском

В остальном kit без зазора: verify-списка F1 хватило для RED-набора из 17 тестов без уточняющих вопросов; donor read-only pin не мешал smoke-чтению.

findings.summary: CI exit-code gate is silently inert on the 4-column truncated prod export: a candidate that completely loses generated_sql exits 0, not 1. Missing subquestion_answer makes is_subq_error() true on BOTH sides, so the verdict is BOTH_ERROR (never ERROR_NEW), and question-level degrades to SQL_CHANGED. Spec-literal and donor-identical, and the journal documents the BOTH_ERROR degeneracy — but not this sharper consequence that the headline CI regression gate cannot fire at subquestion level on one of the two supported input formats.
findings.evidence: Probe: 4-col baseline 'Q1,1,SELECT 1 FROM t,answer one' vs candidate 'Q1,1,,answer one' → per_question SQL_CHANGED=1, per_subquestion BOTH_ERROR=1, EXIT=0. Reproduced on real donor CSVs (/home/nikita/PROJECTS/AI_analyst_for_work/AI_analyst_migration/dev/validation/results/): 13/13 subquestions BOTH_ERROR, ERROR_NEW structurally unreachable. Code: /home/nikita/PROJECTS/prompt-regress/promptdiff/compare.py is_subq_error() line 103 ('return not (sub.get("answer") or "").strip()').

findings.summary: RED commit message says '16 tests blocked at collection' but tests/test_compare.py contains 17 test functions (GREEN message correctly says 17). Cosmetic inconsistency in the audit trail only.

/home/nikita/PROJECTS/prompt-regress/promptdiff/compare.py line 83 vs donor compare_runs.py line ~127. All other verdict rules (ERROR_STATUSES, is_question_error, is_subq_error, compute_*_verdict, pairing by normalized question + subquestion position, VERDICT_ORDER sort) match verbatim.

evalr.reproduced: Ran ./init.sh (18 passed, GREEN) and own /tmp mini-CSVs through .venv/bin/python -m promptdiff compare: empty-SQL candidate → ERROR_NEW/exit 1; identical → exit 0; missing path → exit 2; BOM, 4-col CSV, extra subquestion → ITER1_ONLY, case/whitespace-only SQL → BOTH_OK all pass. Diffed donor compare_runs.py (read-only) — verdict logic matches; smoke on real donor CSVs reproduced devlog #2 numbers exactly (32 q/36 subq); git history shows RED commit (tests only, recorded failure) before GREEN; features.json passes=true matches reality; journal filled. Sole surviving debt: exit-code gate cannot fire on 4-col exports (probe: lost SQL → exit 0).
